Skills.Name: Spellcraft
Skills.Description: Universal magic mastery. +1 damage on every spell you cast, regardless of element. Pairs with element-specific trees (Pyromancy, Cryomancy, etc.) for stacking bonuses.

Powers.Name: Empower
Powers.Description: +2 additional damage on every spell. Stacks additively with Spellcraft's root +1 — so owning both gives +3 on every spell, regardless of element. Universal flat bonus, no gating.

Powers.Name: Arcane Surge
Powers.Description: Active ability: instantly resets every other activated ability's cooldown to 0 — full spell-suite reload. 250-turn cooldown on Surge itself.

Powers.Name: Ley Tap
Powers.Description: Active ability: drain 15% of your current HP. The next spell you cast within 3 turns deals (drained HP × 2) bonus damage, regardless of element. 40-turn cooldown.
